packages.name: @vanrot/runtime
packages.summary: Signals, computed values, effects, batching, lifecycle helpers, DOM mounting, input helpers, and runtime graph contracts. Headless behavior helpers live in @vanrot/behavior.

packages.name: @vanrot/behavior
packages.summary: Optional headless behavior helpers for forms, tables, overlays, tabs, tooltips, toasts, command menus, positioned layers, collapsibles, selection widgets, menus, toggles, scroll areas, portals, focus utilities, calendars, drag/drop, and table resizing.

packages.name: @vanrot/compiler
packages.summary: Template compilation, scoped CSS rewriting, diagnostics, source maps, child components, slots, metadata readers, and generated component modules.

packages.name: @vanrot/config
packages.summary: Typed Vanrot config helpers, defaults, normalization, validation, migrations, diagnostics, and install-aware config edits.

packages.name: @vanrot/language-server
packages.summary: Vanrot template detection, LSP initialize/completion/navigation/diagnostics/expression-smarts handling, stdio server entry, and IntelliJ-consumed template glob artifact.

packages.name: @vanrot/router
packages.summary: Route refs, layouts, nested outlets, navigation helpers, route metadata, preloading, keep-alive policies, and router diagnostics.

packages.name: @vanrot/ssr
packages.summary: Opt-in SSR package for deterministic HTML rendering, shell generation, escaped hydration state, hydration attach helpers, mismatch diagnostics, and router SSR resolution.

packages.name: @vanrot/vite-plugin
packages.summary: Vanrot component transforms, virtual modules, scoped CSS modules, diagnostics bridge, project metadata, and production builds.

packages.name: @vanrot/cli
packages.summary: Project creation, generation, UI additions, config inspection, doctor checks, project maps, AI rule files, dev, build, and test commands.

packages.name: @vanrot/ui
packages.summary: Shadcn-inspired Vanrot-native primitives used by the site and the component documentation catalog.

packages.name: @vanrot/testing
packages.summary: Readable component, page, router, accessibility, async, and generator test helpers built on Vitest and jsdom.

packages.name: @vanrot/forms
packages.summary: Signal-native form state, validation, field arrays, wizards, form-scoped async resources, server errors, draft persistence, metadata, diagnostics, and tests.

packages.name: @vanrot/formatters
packages.summary: Pure formatter helpers, compiler pipe registry execution, locale context, custom pipe definitions, enum pipes, named presets, masks, form messages, diagnostics metadata, and pipe test helpers.

packages.name: @vanrot/devtools
packages.summary: Project map graph contracts, DevTools panel assets, runtime graph metadata, and project intelligence helpers.

packages.name: @vanrot/ai
packages.summary: Generated AI knowledge bundle, verification, MCP server resources, Skill.sh package files, and provider-neutral framework rules.

packages.name: @vanrot/seo
packages.summary: Metadata normalization, head rendering, social tags, structured data, sitemap, robots, and SEO ladder helpers for generated Vanrot apps.

publicExports.summary: All public exports from @vanrot/runtime are covered by the runtime and public API documentation.

publicExports.name: ReadHydrationStateOptions

publicExports.name: SsrRouteResult

publicExports.name: VanrotSsrError

publicExports.name: renderToString

publicExports.name: serializeHydrationState

publicExports.name: readHydrationState

publicExports.name: diagnoseRouteHydration

publicExports.name: createWizard

publicExports.name: applyServerErrors

publicExports.name: diagnoseForm

publicExports.name: useSchemaAdapter

commands.name: create
commands.summary: Creates a routed Vanrot app with the configured package manager and starter files.
notes: Creates a Vanrot app shell, starter route files, config, package scripts, and source-owned CSS.
Use --behavior tooltip,toast,collapsible,selection,calendar to opt into @vanrot/behavior helpers or --no-behavior to keep the starter lean.

commands.name: generate
commands.summary: Generates convention-based component and page files, with optional colocated tests.
notes: Keeps role suffixes, template files, scoped CSS, and optional @vanrot/testing files aligned with Vanrot conventions.

commands.name: add
commands.summary: Adds Vanrot packages or UI primitives and updates config when needed.
notes: Used by the design component workflow to install primitives without hand-copying framework-owned files.

commands.name: remove
commands.summary: Removes optional behavior helpers from project config.
notes: Removes a behavior helper from behavior.enabled without removing @vanrot/behavior by default.
--package removes @vanrot/behavior only when no behavior helpers remain.

commands.name: ui
commands.summary: Inspects and manages Vanrot UI primitive metadata.
notes: Reports primitive metadata from the same registry used by the documentation site.

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.summary: List known UI primitives.

subcommands.name: <component> --help
subcommands.summary: Show metadata, anatomy, tokens, slots, events, and examples for one primitive.

commands.name: config
commands.summary: Reads, validates, and reports normalized Vanrot config.
notes: Normalizes config before CLI, Vite, docs, and AI doorway commands consume it.

subcommands.name: migrate
subcommands.summary: Migrate config into the current schema.

subcommands.name: recover
subcommands.summary: Recover config from a local backup.

commands.name: update
commands.summary: Syncs generated Vanrot project files without changing package versions.
notes: Refreshes canonical config, project intelligence, and AI doorway files through existing command owners.

subcommands.name: config
subcommands.summary: Create missing canonical `vanrot.config.ts` without overwriting user config by default.

subcommands.name: map
subcommands.summary: Refresh `.vanrot/project-map.json`.

subcommands.name: ai
subcommands.summary: Refresh `.vanrot` AI rules, context, prompt, and doctor files.

commands.name: upgrade
commands.summary: Updates installed Vanrot package ranges, installs dependencies, then syncs generated project files.
notes: Targets every `@vanrot/*` package in package.json and reports upgrade failures with stable CLI diagnostic codes.

subcommands.name: --latest
subcommands.summary: Use the latest npm dist-tag.

subcommands.name: --no-install
subcommands.summary: Update package.json without running the detected package manager.

subcommands.name: --no-update
subcommands.summary: Skip the generated file sync after package installation.

commands.name: doctor
commands.summary: Runs local project diagnostics and can include read-only project intelligence with --inspect.
notes: Checks known Vanrot project issues and keeps output readable for humans and scripts.
Use --inspect when you need role, graph, route, i18n, and stale metadata clues without writing .vanrot/project-map.json.

subcommands.name: --inspect
subcommands.summary: Append a read-only project intelligence summary to the health report.

commands.name: cache
commands.summary: Cleans Vanrot-owned local cache and generated project-map files.
notes: The command removes only allowlisted Vanrot-owned paths such as .vanrot/cache and .vanrot/project-map.json.
Use --dry-run before deletion when reviewing what generated metadata will be removed.

subcommands.name: clean
subcommands.summary: Remove allowlisted Vanrot-owned generated metadata.

subcommands.name: --dry-run
subcommands.summary: Show the cleanup list without deleting files.

commands.name: map
commands.summary: Writes the project intelligence manifest at `.vanrot/project-map.json`.
notes: Writes the persisted graph manifest; use vr doctor --inspect when you only need a read-only terminal summary.

commands.name: init-ai
commands.summary: Writes provider-neutral project rules for AI assistants from normalized config.
notes: Creates project-local AI doorway files without storing provider credentials.

commands.name: ai
commands.summary: Builds, verifies, and inspects AI-readable Vanrot knowledge alongside project AI doorway files.
notes: Consumes the official `docs/ai` bundle for MCP, Skill.sh, rules, and command guidance.

subcommands.name: build
subcommands.summary: Regenerate `docs/ai` from framework docs, command metadata, phase maturity, and inventory sources.

subcommands.name: verify
subcommands.summary: Fail when `docs/ai` is stale, missing, unsupported, or incomplete.

subcommands.name: doctor
subcommands.summary: Explain AI bundle freshness and doorway state.

subcommands.name: mcp
subcommands.summary: Print local MCP stdio setup instructions for `vanrot-mcp`.

subcommands.name: context
subcommands.summary: Write project-local AI context files.

subcommands.name: prompt
subcommands.summary: Write the project AI prompt seed.

subcommands.name: record
subcommands.summary: Record an AI history entry with code, file, or message metadata.

subcommands.name: summarize
subcommands.summary: Summarize project-local AI history.

commands.name: dev
commands.summary: Starts the configured Vite development server through the Vanrot CLI.
notes: Uses normalized Vanrot config and keeps local server output aligned with CLI reporter conventions.

commands.name: build
commands.summary: Runs a production build through the Vanrot CLI.
notes: Delegates to the configured build runner while preserving Vanrot diagnostics and reporter output.

commands.name: test
commands.summary: Runs the configured test command for a Vanrot project.
notes: Wraps project-owned test scripts instead of inventing a second test runner.

diagnostics.summary: Compiler diagnostic for unsupported or invalid component source.
Compiler diagnostic for invalid Vanrot UI primitive variants.
Compiler diagnostic for duplicate Vanrot UI dotted tokens.
Compiler diagnostic for unknown Vanrot UI dotted tokens.
Template pipe diagnostic for a pipe name that is not built in and not exported from a .pipe.ts role file.
Template pipe diagnostic for an unknown namespace preset such as date.invoice or mask.malaysiaPhone.
Template pipe diagnostic for duplicate custom pipe names discovered across .pipe.ts files.
Template pipe diagnostic for duplicate custom presets in the same formatter namespace.
Template pipe diagnostic for argument shapes the compiler cannot lower safely.
Template pipe diagnostic for custom pipe exports that do not use the supported formatter helpers.
Template pipe diagnostic for async pipe handlers, which are unsupported because pipes must stay pure and synchronous.
SSR diagnostic for browser-only API access during server rendering.
Hydration diagnostic for server/client text divergence.
Hydration diagnostic for server/client attribute divergence.
Hydration diagnostic for server/client route divergence.
Config diagnostic for invalid config shape or loading failure.
Config diagnostic for the Phase 13 validation catalog.
Config diagnostic for AI rule section validation.
Config diagnostic for AI rule ordering validation.
Config diagnostic for AI rule customization validation.
Config diagnostic for AI rule source validation.
Config diagnostic for an empty formatting.locale value in vanrot.config.ts.
Config diagnostic for an empty formatting.timezone value in vanrot.config.ts.
Config diagnostic for an empty formatting.currency value in vanrot.config.ts.
Router diagnostic for child routes declared before a valid parent.
Form diagnostic for a field definition missing an explicit default value.
Form diagnostic for async form work that cannot be cancelled or safely ignored.
Form diagnostic for sensitive fields configured for draft persistence.
Vite terminal warning for repeated string field paths instead of named form refs.
Form diagnostic for unsupported compiler two-way binding syntax before a forms-aware syntax ships.
Form diagnostic for server-returned errors targeting an unknown form path.
Form diagnostic for invalid schema adapter shape or field metadata.

generatedFiles.summary: Project manifest containing scripts, dependencies, package manager metadata, and private workspace state.
TypeScript project configuration generated for Vanrot app source files and package resolution.
Vite configuration that installs the Vanrot plugin.
Typed Vanrot config source for source roots, dev server defaults, UI configuration, behavior.enabled, and AI rule settings.
Named route refs and route metadata for app navigation without repeated route strings.
Project intelligence manifest generated by `vr map` for devtools and local inspection.
Reusable form role files discoverable by Vite, future Forge, editor diagnostics, and AI-readable reports.
Reusable formatter role files discoverable by Vite for custom pipes, enum pipes, named presets, terminal diagnostics, and AI-readable reports.

conventions.title: Role suffixes
conventions.summary: Components, pages, dialogs, layouts, widgets, forms, and pipes use explicit role-based file suffixes.

conventions.title: Scoped CSS
conventions.summary: Component styles live in sibling scoped CSS files instead of global style buckets.

conventions.title: Signals for state
conventions.summary: Vanrot application state uses signals and readable helpers instead of nested imperative flow.

conventions.title: Route refs
conventions.summary: Routes use named refs and central sources of truth instead of repeated path strings.

conventions.title: No UI markup in TypeScript
conventions.summary: UI markup belongs in HTML templates, while TypeScript owns state, imports, and behavior.

limitations.title: Remaining post-production features are tracked separately
limitations.summary: Brutalist UI, store, streaming SSR, event replay, partial hydration, islands, and resumability remain outside current public framework behavior.

limitations.title: Deployment is prepared, not launched
limitations.summary: The site is prepared for production hosting, but DNS, credentials, analytics setup, and live deployment are outside this phase.

maturity.title: Forms and async resources
maturity.summary: Phase 21 shipped @vanrot/forms with validation, resources, arrays, wizards, server errors, drafts, metadata, diagnostics, docs, and tests.

maturity.title: Documentation and web presence
maturity.summary: Phase 24 completed framework docs, examples, site polish, and drift checks.

maturity.title: AI consumption
maturity.summary: Phase 25 generated the official AI bundle, MCP transport, Skill.sh package, and CLI verification commands.

maturity.title: Formatters and template pipes
maturity.summary: Phase 29 shipped compiler-owned template pipes, @vanrot/formatters, .pipe.ts discovery, built-in formatters, custom presets, formatting context, diagnostics, docs, and tests.

routeMetadata.title: Vanrot - Framework Documentation And Design Components
routeMetadata.description: Vanrot's public landing page for framework documentation, design components, examples, and production-readiness notes.

routeMetadata.title: Vanrot Framework Documentation
routeMetadata.description: Framework documentation for Vanrot packages, APIs, commands, diagnostics, conventions, examples, limitations, and deployment preparation.

routeMetadata.title: Vanrot Forms And Async Resources
routeMetadata.description: Guide to @vanrot/forms, signal-native form state, validation, field arrays, wizards, async resources, server errors, drafts, metadata, diagnostics, and tests.

routeMetadata.title: Vanrot Formatters And Template Pipes
routeMetadata.description: Guide to @vanrot/formatters, compiler-owned template pipe syntax, built-in formatters, custom .pipe.ts files, presets, context, diagnostics, and tests.

routeMetadata.title: Vanrot Design Component Catalog
routeMetadata.description: Design component documentation for Vanrot's October UI primitives, variants, usage examples, and API notes.

routeMetadata.title: Vanrot Changelog
routeMetadata.description: Published Vanrot release notes with direct links into the framework documentation for every shipped change.

deployment.summary: The site is prepared for production hosting, but DNS, credentials, analytics, and live deployment are not performed by this repository phase.
